description_long: This is a small, rustic cabin with a rectangular footprint and a prominent gable roof made of dark, ribbed material. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, showing signs of weathering and greenish moss or mildew near the base, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The front facade features a pair of simple, dark double doors, which appear to be made of textured wood or metal, providing access to the interior. There are no visible windows on any side, giving the structure a utilitarian and secure appearance. The roof has a slight overhang, offering minimal protection to the entryway. The overall design is functional and unadorned, suitable for use as a storage shed, garden outbuilding, or basic shelter in an urban or park setting.
description: A small, weathered wooden cabin with a dark gable roof and double front doors, lacking windows and decorative features.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the dark, ribbed gable roof and the rectangular shape of the cabin.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the triangular gable and the weathered wooden siding with no visible doors or windows.
description_view_2: Opposite top-down view of the roof, showing the same rectangular form and overhang as view 0.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the double doors, gable roof, and the weathered wooden facade.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhang, constructed from ribbed dark material
attribute_window_arrangement: No windows are visible on any side of the cabin
attribute_door_placement: A single set of double doors is centered on the front facade beneath the gable
